title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Apoo, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It becomes resistant to water and fire, and much more durable.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Building a fire is a lot of work, though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Where did you learn all that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I read the logbook and ship blueprints in detail

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So now I know every bit of information, useful or not.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really still believe in that book of lies?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's no such thing as Giants!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, I read that a long time ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Depending on our course, we might stumble upon it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you heard the legend of the continent puller?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My grand- pa used to tell me a tale...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: About a man bigger than giants

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I've heard that his design- dants...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We managed to find some fresh water

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: without food forced to build a ship

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not have many days to complete their task.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The hunger did not just weaken us,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It ate away at our souls

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't push your- self too much!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you pass out, all is lost!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He never whined nor took breaks

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 44 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
